examples: Accordingly, hare bravery already became ursine bravery substitute.
Suspicion still feels after Little Bear listens, go asking ursine father.
A few weeks later a better use of beer was discovered by an innocent ursine in the Pacific Northwest.
For all its ursine huffing and puffing, Gazprom vitally needs outsiders.
Benny Avni, the head of the District Council of Tel Ilan, was a lanky man with stooped shoulders and a fondness for rumpled clothes and oversized sweaters, which gave him an ursine look.
